message:
chore: beads issue tracker update from concurrent agents

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.18","title":"[peer-review][http] Diff audit of Limited test-only ubs ignore in src/http/body.rs","description":"Bounded diff audit of the current src/http/body.rs change only. Verify that the added // ubs:ignore comment on the Limited test helper panic suppresses a legitimate intentional contract-violation signal in test-only code and does not hide production behavior risk. No broad HTTP/body work.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseEagle","estimated_minutes":20,"created_at":"2026-04-01T03:27:07.293957166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T03:28:38.694899779Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T03:28:38.694567251Z","close_reason":"Diff audit complete: the new // ubs:ignore sits on a panic inside the test-only EofThenPanicBody sentinel in src/http/body.rs. That panic exists specifically to assert Limited never repolls an inner body after EOF, so suppressing UBS on that intentional contract-violation path is sound and does not affect production behavior.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["http","peer-review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.18","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-01T03:27:07.293957166Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.19","title":"[peer-review][http] Diff audit of src/http/body.rs UBS suppression","description":"Fresh-eyes diff audit on the current src/http/body.rs change only. Verified that the new UBS suppression comment is attached to a test-only contract panic in EofThenPanicBody under #[cfg(test)], while Limited<B>::poll_frame transitions to Completed and does not repoll the inner body after terminal completion. No production regression found.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseEagle","estimated_minutes":20,"created_at":"2026-04-01T03:28:28.617162559Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T03:28:58.717381982Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T03:28:58.716906489Z","close_reason":"Diff audit complete: the new ubs:ignore comment is attached only to a deliberate #[cfg(test)] contract panic in EofThenPanicBody. Production Limited<B>::poll_frame transitions to Completed on Poll::Ready(None) and returns Poll::Ready(None) on later polls without re-entering the inner body, so no runtime regression was introduced.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","http","peer-review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.19","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-01T03:28:28.617162559Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.2","title":"[RANDOM-AUDIT][clippy-unblock] Fix manual_assert in util/arena test","description":"Unblock workspace clippy -D warnings by replacing panic-only if-then in src/util/arena.rs test with assert!-style predicate while preserving test intent.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"CloudyGrove","created_at":"2026-03-05T00:35:41.004679710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-05T00:39:43.797685131Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T00:39:43.797664443Z","close_reason":"Validated no-op in local working tree: manual_assert fix already present in src/util/arena.rs diff. Full rch validation blocked by unrelated workspace/toolchain noise; reservation released.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["clippy","random-audit","util"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.2","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-05T00:35:41.004679710Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.20","title":"[peer-review][database] Restore pool debug stats contract in src/database/pool.rs","description":"Current changed surface in src/database/pool.rs adds `.field("stats", &self.stats)` to DbPool/AsyncDbPool debug output, but PoolStatCounters has no Debug implementation. That is a compile-time regression on the live peer-review frontier. Fix by giving PoolStatCounters a truthful Debug surface and add focused regression coverage for pool debug output.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Codex","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:19:50.422084256Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T17:20:01.088661416Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["database","peer-review","random-audit"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.20","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:19:50.422084256Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2850,"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.20","author":"Codex","text":"2026-04-01 Codex: Taking this current peer-review frontier on src/database/pool.rs. The active regression is compile-level, not semantic drift: DbPool/AsyncDbPool debug output now references `self.stats`, but PoolStatCounters has no Debug implementation. MCP Agent Mail bootstrap still fails with a transient database error from this session, so this bead comment is the durable coordination record while I patch + validate via rch.","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:20:01Z"}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.3","title":"[RANDOM-AUDIT][compile-frontier] Fix rate_limit_float_bug integration test API drift","description":"Resolve current cargo-check compile frontier with narrow, conflict-aware edits: (1) src/web/middleware.rs type mismatch comparing u32 tokens against 0.0 float; (2) tests/rate_limit_float_bug.rs stale API usage (Time import path and RateLimitPolicy.algorithm field). Validate with rch-offloaded checks.","notes":"Deferred by CopperCastle: overlapping active ownership by PurpleFalcon/CobaltHarbor on compile-frontier files; pivoted to non-overlapping audit surface.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"CopperCastle","estimated_minutes":45,"created_at":"2026-03-05T02:36:14.284577046Z","created_by":"CopperCastle","updated_at":"2026-03-05T05:30:28.810931647Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T05:30:28.802711079Z","close_reason":"Validated: original compile-frontier issues (middleware.rs float, rate_limit_float_bug.rs API) already resolved on main. Test compiles and passes. Additionally fixed clippy unused-mut in mutex.rs:411 (OwnedLockFuture poll).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compile","random-audit","rate-limit","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.3","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-05T02:36:14.284577046Z","created_by":"CopperCastle","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.4","title":"[RANDOM-AUDIT][service/sync] Audit and fix buffer+semaphore changed-surface regressions","description":"Review changed surfaces in src/service/buffer.rs and src/sync/semaphore.rs for correctness/regression issues, apply fixes, and validate with rch-offloaded targeted checks.","notes":"Implemented fix in src/service/buffer.rs: poll_ready now uses consistent lock order (pending -> ready_wakers) to match completion/drop paths and deduplicates repeated waker registration when full. Added unit test poll_ready_deduplicates_waker_when_full. Validation: rch exec -- cargo check --lib (pass), rch exec -- cargo check --all-targets (pass), rch exec -- cargo test --lib service::buffer::tests::poll_ready_deduplicates_waker_when_full -- --exact --nocapture (pass). Workspace-wide clippy still failing in unrelated files: src/combinator/rate_limit.rs, src/runtime/blocking_pool.rs, src/runtime/timer.rs, src/raptorq/gf256.rs.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"CopperCastle","estimated_minutes":60,"created_at":"2026-03-05T02:41:17.472741159Z","created_by":"CopperCastle","updated_at":"2026-03-05T02:58:34.612100851Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T02:58:34.612075814Z","close_reason":"Completed: fixed buffer lock-order inversion and waker dedup regression; added regression test and validated via rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["buffer","random-audit","semaphore","service","sync"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.4","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-05T02:41:17.472741159Z","created_by":"CopperCastle","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-28c51.302.5","title":"[RANDOM-AUDIT][scheduler] Skip benign singleton spectral history while preserving trapped self-cycles","description":"Peer-review follow-up under asupersync-28c51.302. The recent trapped-cycle fix in src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs broadened the live spectral-monitor guard from wait_graph_nodes > 1 to > 0. Because wait_graph_signals_from_state counts every non-terminal task, that change started recording spectral history for ordinary singleton live-task states with zero wait edges, altering the governor/decision-contract live path for degenerate graphs that carry no dependency structure. Scope: narrow the guard so singleton graphs are analyzed only when they actually carry a trapped self-cycle, add focused regression coverage for the benign-singleton and trapped-self-cycle cases, and validate with rch-backed cargo commands.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AmberSnow","created_at":"2026-03-21T02:12:06.525561935Z","created_by":"AmberSnow","updated_at":"2026-03-21T02:12:59.931852125Z","closed_at":"2026-03-21T02:12:59.931826287Z","close_reason":"Fixed singleton spectral-history regression in three_lane governor path","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-28c51.302.5","depends_on_id":"asupersync-28c51.302","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-21T02:12:06.525561935Z","created_by":"AmberSnow","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
@@ -3825,7 +3826,7 @@
 {"id":"asupersync-36m6p.14","title":"[RAPTORQ-RFC6330][E5] Share Track-E policy/probe payload builder to prevent metadata drift","description":"The Track-E policy log and policy probe log in `benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs` currently duplicate the same large block of manifest/profile/decision metadata by hand. Recent E5 support slices have repeatedly had to tighten contract coverage around one of those duplicated fields at a time. Extract a shared payload builder so both emitters consume one canonical metadata path, then add an invariant proving both emitters route through that shared builder.","acceptance_criteria":"1. `benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs` uses one shared helper/builder for the common Track-E policy/probe metadata payload instead of duplicating the field block in both emitters. 2. Both emitters still preserve their schema-version and repro-command differences while sharing the canonical metadata path. 3. `tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs` proves both emitters route through the shared builder so future metadata additions cannot silently drift. 4. Validation uses rch-backed targeted cargo lanes only and the bead/mail trail records the exact commands.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SageGorge","estimated_minutes":60,"created_at":"2026-03-27T05:20:47.457051943Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T05:41:02.725702034Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T05:41:02.725307280Z","close_reason":"Completed shared Track-E policy/probe payload builder and invariant coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmarking","contract","gf256","raptorq"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.14","depends_on_id":"asupersync-36m6p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-27T05:20:47.457051943Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2737,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.14","author":"SageGorge","text":"Start note: taking a bounded E5 refactor on `benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs` + `tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs` to replace the duplicated Track-E policy/probe metadata payload block with one shared builder. Agent Mail reservation calls are currently timing out on my side, so this bead comment is the durable coordination record until the mail layer recovers. I checked the touched paths in `git status` first; they are clean before my edit.","created_at":"2026-03-27T05:25:12Z"},{"id":2739,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.14","author":"SageGorge","text":"Completed bounded E5 Track-E payload dedup on `benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs` + `tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs`.

What changed:
- extracted `TrackEPolicyPayloadContext` + `track_e_policy_payload(...)` so the policy log and policy probe log share one canonical metadata builder
- kept the schema-version and repro-command differences at the call sites while removing the duplicated field block
- added `e5_policy_log_and_probe_share_common_payload_builder` to prove both emitters route through the shared helper

Validation via `rch`:
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-target-sagegorge-e5-shared-payload-v2-test cargo test -p asupersync --test raptorq_perf_invariants e5_policy_log_and_probe_share_common_payload_builder -- --nocapture` => PASS
- `rch exec -- env TMPDIR=/data CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch-target-sagegorge-e5-shared-payload-v2-check cargo check --all-targets` => PASS
- `rch exec -- env TMPDIR=/data CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch-target-sagegorge-e5-shared-payload-v2-clippy cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` => PASS
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check` => PASS
- local `rustfmt +nightly --edition 2024 benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs` and `git diff --check -- benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs` => PASS","created_at":"2026-03-27T05:40:59Z"}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-36m6p.15","title":"[RAPTORQ-RFC6330][E5] Lock shared Track-E builder call-site schema/repro split","description":"The new shared Track-E policy/probe payload builder in benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs removes duplicate metadata assembly, but the call-site distinction between policy-log vs probe-log schema_version and repro_command constants is still implicit. Add a focused invariant in tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs that proves the policy emitter keeps the policy schema/repro constants and the probe emitter keeps the probe schema/repro constants, so future helper refactors cannot silently collapse the forensic split.","acceptance_criteria":"1. tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs asserts the Track-E policy-log emitter keeps TRACK_E_POLICY_SCHEMA_VERSION plus TRACK_E_REPRO_CMD at its shared-builder call site. 2. tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs asserts the Track-E policy-probe emitter keeps TRACK_E_POLICY_PROBE_SCHEMA_VERSION plus TRACK_E_POLICY_PROBE_REPRO_CMD at its shared-builder call site. 3. Validation uses rch-backed targeted cargo lanes plus cargo fmt --check and records the exact commands in the bead trail.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SageGorge","estimated_minutes":45,"created_at":"2026-03-27T05:49:44.005842827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-27T05:55:31.410972668Z","closed_at":"2026-03-27T05:55:31.410617047Z","close_reason":"Completed shared-builder call-site schema/repro contract invariant","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmarking","contract","gf256","raptorq"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.15","depends_on_id":"asupersync-36m6p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-27T05:49:44.005842827Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2743,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.15","author":"SageGorge","text":"Start note: staying on the same bounded Track-E bench/test surface after closing asupersync-36m6p.14. Scope for this child is benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs + tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs only. Goal is to lock the emitter call-site split so the shared payload builder cannot accidentally collapse TRACK_E_POLICY_SCHEMA_VERSION / TRACK_E_REPRO_CMD into the probe constants or vice versa.","created_at":"2026-03-27T05:50:01Z"},{"id":2744,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.15","author":"SageGorge","text":"Completed the bounded call-site contract hardening slice in tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs.

What changed:
- added e5_policy_log_and_probe_keep_distinct_schema_and_repro_constants
- the new invariant proves the shared-builder policy-log emitter keeps TRACK_E_POLICY_SCHEMA_VERSION + TRACK_E_REPRO_CMD
- the new invariant proves the shared-builder probe emitter keeps TRACK_E_POLICY_PROBE_SCHEMA_VERSION + TRACK_E_POLICY_PROBE_REPRO_CMD
- also asserts each emitter does not drift to the other emitter's constants

Validation via rch:
- `rch exec -- env TMPDIR=/data CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch-target-sagegorge-e5-callsite-v1-test cargo test -p asupersync --test raptorq_perf_invariants e5_policy_log_and_probe_keep_distinct_schema_and_repro_constants -- --nocapture` => PASS
- `rch exec -- env TMPDIR=/data CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch-target-sagegorge-e5-callsite-v1-check cargo check --all-targets` => PASS
- `rch exec -- env TMPDIR=/data CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch-target-sagegorge-e5-callsite-v1-clippy cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` => PASS
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check` => PASS
- local `rustfmt +nightly --edition 2024 tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs` and `git diff --check -- tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs` => PASS","created_at":"2026-03-27T05:55:28Z"}]}
 {"id":"asupersync-36m6p.16","title":"[RAPTORQ-RFC6330][E5] Fail closed on override tuning-corpus provenance","description":"Bounded E5 support slice: when manual GF256 profile-pack overrides mutate the live contract, scrub canonical tuning-corpus provenance from the runtime manifest/policy/bench surface as well, and lock the behavior with targeted unit + perf invariant coverage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"FuchsiaCitadel","created_at":"2026-03-31T19:09:36.604009204Z","created_by":"FuchsiaCitadel","updated_at":"2026-04-01T03:07:10.485148912Z","closed_at":"2026-04-01T03:07:10.484792279Z","close_reason":"Completed: bounded RaptorQ override tuning-corpus provenance slice","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["gf256","performance","raptorq"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.16","depends_on_id":"asupersync-36m6p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-31T19:09:36.604009204Z","created_by":"FuchsiaCitadel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2817,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.16","author":"FuchsiaCitadel","text":"Completed bounded E5 support slice. Code changes landed in src/raptorq/gf256.rs, tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs, docs/raptorq_baseline_bench_profile.md, and scripts/run_raptorq_e2e.sh. rch validation passed for the three targeted perf/doc/probe invariants plus cargo fmt --check. Broad workspace check/clippy remain red in src/lab/oracle/mod.rs outside this bead surface.","created_at":"2026-04-01T03:07:10Z"}]}
-{"id":"asupersync-36m6p.17","title":"[RAPTORQ-RFC6330][E5] Fail closed on invalid ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY requests","description":"Bounded E5 support slice on src/raptorq/gf256.rs plus Track-E log/invariant/docs surfaces as needed. Current dual-policy env parsing silently treats unknown ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY values as Auto. Tighten this so invalid mode requests are surfaced explicitly in the live policy/manifest/log contract with deterministic fallback semantics, add focused regression coverage, and validate only with rch-backed targeted cargo lanes.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"RoseEagle","estimated_minutes":60,"created_at":"2026-04-01T15:02:31.890987075Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-01T17:15:39.272988786Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["gf256","performance","raptorq","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.17","depends_on_id":"asupersync-36m6p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-01T15:02:31.890987075Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2829,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.17","author":"RoseEagle","text":"Taking this bounded E5 support slice because bv --robot-plan still ranks asupersync-36m6p the highest-impact actionable track. Concrete target: ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY currently accepts unknown text by silently falling back to Auto with no explicit provenance. I am tightening the live policy/manifest/log contract so invalid mode requests are surfaced deterministically, then validating only with rch-backed targeted cargo lanes. Agent Mail inbox/send remain unavailable from this session due the current MCP database fault, so this bead comment is the durable coordination record.","created_at":"2026-04-01T15:03:10Z"},{"id":2846,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.17","author":"RoseEagle","text":"Patch in progress: src/raptorq/gf256.rs now records explicit fallback provenance for invalid ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY values; updating bench/script/docs contract surface in benches/raptorq_benchmark.rs, tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs, scripts/run_raptorq_e2e.sh, and docs/raptorq_baseline_bench_profile.md. Agent Mail health is green but fetch_inbox still returns a DB error, so this bead comment is the durable coordination record for now.","created_at":"2026-04-01T17:15:39Z"}]}

 {"id":"asupersync-36m6p.18","title":"[RAPTORQ-RFC6330][E5] Lock override summary and delta truthfulness in live dual-policy contract","description":"Bounded E5 support slice: tighten the GF256 profile-pack override contract so live unit/perf invariant surfaces explicitly require override-only rationale and NA delta fields whenever runtime env overrides make the selection non-canonical.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SnowyOsprey","created_at":"2026-04-01T15:07:30.806738372Z","created_by":"SnowyOsprey","updated_at":"2026-04-01T15:23:37.334842868Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["gf256","performance","raptorq"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.18","depends_on_id":"asupersync-36m6p","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-04-01T15:07:30.806738372Z","created_by":"SnowyOsprey","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2835,"issue_id":"asupersync-36m6p.18","author":"SnowyOsprey","text":"Validation note: first remote unit lane for profile_pack_env_request_* passed on vmi1152480.
